## 領域實體與關係 (Domain Entities)

<!-- 說明此領域的核心實體（例如：Member, Order, Cart 等）與其主要屬性 -->

```mermaid
classDiagram
    class User {
        +String userId
        +String email
        +register()
    }
    class Account {
        +String accountId
        +String balance
        +deposit()
    }
    User "1" --> "1" Account
```
